Internal Revenue Service
Department of the Treasury

Tax Year 2024 — Notice of Assessment
Notice Date: February 15, 2025
Notice Number: CP2000-2025-48721

Taxpayer: Erik Nilsson
SSN: ***-**-1234
Filing Status: Single

INCOME SUMMARY
  Wages (W-2):                    $78,500.00
  Interest income (1099-INT):        $425.00
  Freelance income (1099-NEC):     $6,075.00
  Adjusted Gross Income:          $85,000.00

TAX COMPUTATION
  Federal income tax:             $14,200.00
  Self-employment tax:               $858.00
  Total tax liability:            $15,058.00

CREDITS AND PAYMENTS
  Federal withholding (W-2):      $15,800.00
  Estimated tax payments:            $858.00
  Total credits:                  $16,658.00

RESULT
  Overpayment:                     $1,600.00
  Refund amount:                   $1,600.00

Your refund of $1,600.00 will be direct-deposited to the bank account
on file within 21 business days.

If you have questions about this notice, call 1-800-829-1040 or visit
www.irs.gov. Please reference Notice Number CP2000-2025-48721.

This notice is for tax year 2024 only.
